criteria.text: Block-aware provider parsing: providerCountsFromGrid counts ONLY rows between DATE and TOTAL; rows after TOTAL (service tally like allergy, stray labels) are excluded from provider counts

Found-but-not-counted warnings: parser collects labels it does not include (after-TOTAL rows, unrecognized labels); /api/reports returns a warnings list of those labels and the Reports page shows a visible N-items-not-counted note; report still renders (degrade, never throw)
PHI-safe warnings + audit: warnings and workbook-read audit carry sheet/label references only, never cell values (counts) or patient data

Real period (no Week 0): /api/reports returns the actual period (current month/year + prior period) derived from the selected sheet tab/blocks (not the host clock, zone-independent); header shows e.g. June 2026 vs May 2026, never Week 0
Month/Week toggle: user toggles Monthly (current month vs prior month summed) and Weekly (latest weekly block vs prior week); each views labels and numbers match the selected period; default Monthly
criteria.defer: split to follow-up MAD-51 — Month/Week toggle (weekly-block view) not built in this slice

criteria.text: Backward-compatible DTO: period/view/warnings are additive; existing metrics/encountersBySpecialty/providers shape preserved; frontend updated in lockstep; weekNumber retained but no longer rendered

Offline gate on synthetic fixtures modeled on real workbook shapes (monthly tabs with weekly blocks, an after-TOTAL service row, dirty labels) pin provider-exclusion, warnings, period, weekly-vs-monthly; no real workbook or staff names committed
